Product Description
Legacy
The Legacy range is a Collins classic, designed to stand the test of time. This notebook includes everything you need.
With soft-touch PU covers and many stylish colours to choose from, there is a Legacy for every occasion.
Features:
Luxury soft-touch covers
Elastic closure
240 pages
A5 Size
80gsm ivory paper
Ruled/ Dotted / Blank / Grid layouts
Co-ordinating ribbon marker
Expandable inner pocket
